title: BetterBounties
description: A Free-To-Use Clean Bounties plugin for your minecraft server.
body:
# BETTERBOUNTIES

BetterBounties is a free-to-use bounty plugin. This plugin lets players place and claim bounties on each other. It's easy to use, works well on survival or PvP servers, and adds fun challenges. This is a HIGHLY Configurable plugin. One can even configure the Menu Title!

# IMAGES

![Bounty GUI With a Certain Bounty](https://i.imgur.com/VP7dtR1.png)

![Bounty GUI without any bounties ](https://i.imgur.com/k9Vil2N.png)

![/help command. Displays the list of available commands.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98e8cb5530fc13f40e5e4167c4057d94844334e0.png)

![Bounty Place, Remove and Reload commands](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9565233832d5cba17688aeab59e05a0069fec7a0.png)







# CONFIG.YML FILE


<details>
<summary>Click Me To View CONFIG.YML file</summary>

![Config.yml File](https://i.imgur.com/dPNEdEc.png)
</details>



# PERMISSIONS

> **betterbounties.use:** - Allows opening the bounty GUI (Default)
> 
> **betterbounties.add** - Allows placing a bounty (Default)
> 
> **betterbounties.remove** - Allows removing a bounty (Requires Permission)
> 
> **betterbounties.reload** - Allows Reloading the plugin (Requires Permission)


# COMMANDS

> **/bounty OR /bounties** - Open the Bounty GUI
> 
> **/bounty add <player> <amount>** - Adds A Bounty On A Player
> 
> **/bounty remove <player>** - Removes A Bounty On A Player
> 
> **/bounty reload** - Reloads the plugin
